# chezmoi-management

> Meta-skill for mizchi's chezmoi dotfiles. Invoke ONLY when the user explicitly asks to manage / diff / apply chezmoi sources, add a skill to dotfiles, audit the APM vs chezmoi boundary, or initialize a new machine. Covers source location, diff/apply flow, skill addition, pre-push (pkfire + secretlint). Do NOT auto-invoke when the task only happens to touch a path under ~/.claude/, ~/.config/, or ~/.zshrc — consult only on explicit dotfile-management intent.

## Install

```bash
apm install mizchi/skills/tooling/chezmoi-management
```

For a reproducible setup, declare it in `apm.yml` instead:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - mizchi/skills/tooling/chezmoi-management
```

then run `apm install`.

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->
